name: manual-logging
statements: CREATE TABLE meals (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL CHECK (length(id) BETWEEN 1 AND 128), category TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (category IN ('breakfast','lunch','dinner','snack','other')), occurred_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (occurred_at_utc GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??Z' OR occurred_at_utc GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??.???Z'), local_date TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (local_date GLOB '????-??-??'), timezone_offset_minutes INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (typeof(timezone_offset_minutes) = 'integer' AND timezone_offset_minutes BETWEEN -720 AND 840), calories_kcal_scaled INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (typeof(calories_kcal_scaled) = 'integer' AND calories_kcal_scaled BETWEEN 0 AND 9007199254740991), protein_g_scaled INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (typeof(protein_g_scaled) = 'integer' AND protein_g_scaled BETWEEN 0 AND 9007199254740991), carbohydrates_g_scaled INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (typeof(carbohydrates_g_scaled) = 'integer' AND carbohydrates_g_scaled BETWEEN 0 AND 9007199254740991), fat_g_scaled INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (typeof(fat_g_scaled) = 'integer' AND fat_g_scaled BETWEEN 0 AND 9007199254740991), created_at TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (created_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??Z' OR created_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??.???Z'), updated_at TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (updated_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??Z' OR updated_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??.???Z'))
CREATE INDEX meals_local_date_occurred_at_id ON meals(local_date, occurred_at_utc DESC, id)
CREATE INDEX meals_occurred_at_id ON meals(occurred_at_utc DESC, id)

CREATE TABLE meal_items (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL CHECK (length(id) BETWEEN 1 AND 128), meal_id TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(meal_id) BETWEEN 1 AND 128), position INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (typeof(position) = 'integer' AND position >= 0), food_id TEXT CHECK (food_id IS NULL OR length(food_id) BETWEEN 1 AND 128), food_revision_id TEXT CHECK (food_revision_id IS NULL OR length(food_revision_id) BETWEEN 1 AND 128), input_name TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(input_name) BETWEEN 1 AND 256), input_quantity_scaled INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (typeof(input_quantity_scaled) = 'integer' AND input_quantity_scaled BETWEEN 1 AND 9007199254740991), input_unit TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (length(input_unit) BETWEEN 1 AND 64), resolved_quantity_scaled INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (typeof(resolved_quantity_scaled) = 'integer' AND resolved_quantity_scaled BETWEEN 1 AND 9007199254740991), resolved_unit TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (resolved_unit IN ('gram','millilitre','each','serving')), basis_quantity_scaled INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (typeof(basis_quantity_scaled) = 'integer' AND basis_quantity_scaled BETWEEN 1 AND 9007199254740991), basis_unit TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (basis_unit IN ('gram','millilitre','each','serving')), calories_kcal_scaled INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (typeof(calories_kcal_scaled) = 'integer' AND calories_kcal_scaled BETWEEN 0 AND 9007199254740991), protein_g_scaled INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (typeof(protein_g_scaled) = 'integer' AND protein_g_scaled BETWEEN 0 AND 9007199254740991), carbohydrates_g_scaled INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (typeof(carbohydrates_g_scaled) = 'integer' AND carbohydrates_g_scaled BETWEEN 0 AND 9007199254740991), fat_g_scaled INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (typeof(fat_g_scaled) = 'integer' AND fat_g_scaled BETWEEN 0 AND 9007199254740991), fibre_g_scaled INTEGER CHECK (fibre_g_scaled IS NULL OR (typeof(fibre_g_scaled) = 'integer' AND fibre_g_scaled BETWEEN 0 AND 9007199254740991)), sugar_g_scaled INTEGER CHECK (sugar_g_scaled IS NULL OR (typeof(sugar_g_scaled) = 'integer' AND sugar_g_scaled BETWEEN 0 AND 9007199254740991)), sodium_mg_scaled INTEGER CHECK (sodium_mg_scaled IS NULL OR (typeof(sodium_mg_scaled) = 'integer' AND sodium_mg_scaled BETWEEN 0 AND 9007199254740991)), resolution_method TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (resolution_method IN ('manual','exact','alias','fts','vector','accepted_online')), source_provider TEXT CHECK (source_provider IS NULL OR length(source_provider) BETWEEN 1 AND 256), source_record_id TEXT CHECK (source_record_id IS NULL OR length(source_record_id) BETWEEN 1 AND 256), source_dataset_version TEXT CHECK (source_dataset_version IS NULL OR length(source_dataset_version) BETWEEN 1 AND 256), source_license_id TEXT CHECK (source_license_id IS NULL OR length(source_license_id) BETWEEN 1 AND 256), source_values_hash TEXT CHECK (source_values_hash IS NULL OR (length(source_values_hash) = 64 AND source_values_hash NOT GLOB '*[^0-9a-f]*')), user_modified INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (user_modified IN (0,1)), created_at TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (created_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??Z' OR created_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??.???Z'), CHECK ((food_id IS NULL AND food_revision_id IS NULL) OR (food_id IS NOT NULL AND food_revision_id IS NOT NULL)), UNIQUE(meal_id, position), FOREIGN KEY (meal_id) REFERENCES meals(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, FOREIGN KEY (food_id, food_revision_id) REFERENCES food_revisions(food_id, id) ON DELETE RESTRICT)
CREATE TRIGGER meal_items_immutable_update BEFORE UPDATE ON meal_items BEGIN SELECT RAISE(ABORT, 'meal item snapshots are immutable'); END
CREATE TRIGGER food_portions_immutable_update BEFORE UPDATE ON food_portions BEGIN SELECT RAISE(ABORT, 'food portions are immutable'); END

CREATE TABLE nutrition_goals (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL CHECK (length(id) BETWEEN 1 AND 128), effective_local_date TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE CHECK (effective_local_date GLOB '????-??-??'), calories_kcal_scaled INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (typeof(calories_kcal_scaled) = 'integer' AND calories_kcal_scaled BETWEEN 1 AND 9007199254740991), protein_g_scaled INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (typeof(protein_g_scaled) = 'integer' AND protein_g_scaled BETWEEN 0 AND 9007199254740991), carbohydrates_g_scaled INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (typeof(carbohydrates_g_scaled) = 'integer' AND carbohydrates_g_scaled BETWEEN 0 AND 9007199254740991), fat_g_scaled INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK (typeof(fat_g_scaled) = 'integer' AND fat_g_scaled BETWEEN 0 AND 9007199254740991), created_at TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (created_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??Z' OR created_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??.???Z'), updated_at TEXT NOT NULL CHECK (updated_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??Z' OR updated_at GLOB '????-??-??T??:??:??.???Z'))
